description: African American Vernacular English — systematic grammar, not slang

grammar_features.habitual_be: Invariant 'be' for habitual aspect: 'He be working' = he regularly works
grammar_features.remote_past_been: 'I been knew that' = I have known that for a long time
grammar_features.completive_done: 'I done told you' = I already told you
grammar_features.negative_concord: Multiple negation is standard: 'I ain't never seen nobody'
